description_long: This ornate sconce features a central vertical stem from which six elegantly curved arms radiate outward, each supporting a frosted glass shade. The arms and central column are adorned with multiple hanging crystal pendants, adding a touch of luxury and sparkle. The fixture is primarily constructed from polished metal, likely chrome or silver-plated, which enhances its reflective qualities. The glass shades are shaped like tulip blossoms, diffusing light softly and evenly. Decorative crystal droplets hang from each arm and the lower rim, creating a classic chandelier effect. The overall design is symmetrical and opulent, suitable for upscale urban interiors or grand entryways.
description: A luxurious, multi-arm sconce with frosted glass shades and hanging crystal pendants, featuring polished metal and ornate detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six glass shades, crystal pendants, and the symmetrical arrangement of arms.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the full set of arms and shades, with crystal details visible from a different angle.
description_view_2: Another rotated perspective, highlighting the curvature of the arms and the distribution of crystal pendants.
description_view_3: View similar to the front, emphasizing the central stem and the even spacing of the glass shades and crystals.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a vintage, classic chandelier style with ornate arms, frosted glass tulip shades, and abundant crystal decorations, evoking a sense of elegance and grandeur.
